name: Generic PETG
filament_start_gcode:
; filament start gcode
{if (bed_temperature[current_extruder] >60)||(bed_temperature_initial_layer[current_extruder] >60)}M106 P3 S180
{elsif (bed_temperature[current_extruder] >70)||(bed_temperature_initial_layer[current_extruder] >70)}M106 P3 S255
{endif};Prevent PETG from jamming
